nasb.text: But there are some of you who do not believe.” For Jesus knew from the beginning who they were who did not believe, and who it was that would betray Him.

esv.text: But there are some of you who do not believe.” (For Jesus knew from the beginning who those were who did not believe, and who it was who would betray him.)

cnv.text: 然而你們中間卻有不信的人。”原來從起初耶穌就知道那些不信的是誰，那要把他出賣的又是誰。

ccb.text: 然而，你们中间有些人不信。”因为耶稣一开始就知道谁不信祂、谁会出卖祂。

csbs.text: 然而你们当中有一些不信的人。”原来，耶稣从起初就知道哪些人不信，也知道哪一个人要出卖他。
